title: Cosmetica
description: Free custom capes and cosmetics for Minecraft
body:
Cosmetica

Cosmetica lets you customize your player on a whole new level with cosmetics that rival those of popular PvP clients

# Features - Custom legal capes and elytras up to 2048x1024 resolution. - Custom animated capes - Custom accessories for any part of the character: hats, shoulder buddies, back blings, shoes, you name it! - Custom lore (a second nametag above your head) to show your Discord tag, Twitch URL, GitHub, pronouns, or title. - Interactive online catalogue of all our cosmetics to easily browse and preview cosmetics on your skin before equipping. - Interactive in-game catalogue of all our cosmetics to easily browse and preview cosmetics on your skin before equipping. - Support for third party capes from [Cloaks+](https://cloaksplus.com), [OptiFine](https://optifine.net), [LabyMod](https://labymod.net), [Mantle](https://mantle.gg), [MinecraftCapes.net](https://minecraftcapes.net), [SkinMC](https://skinmc.net/), and Vanilla, (individually configurable and priority list can be modified). - Advanced, secure and easy to use login system that doesn't even require you to enter a password. - Region specific effects (optional) that apply cosmetic effects to players based on their country of origin. - Nearly all features are disableable. - ### All cosmetics are free. - ### Users can design and upload their own cosmetics.
# Screenshots

Player with Pumpkin, Gangster Chicken, Purple Allay, and Katana

![Player with Pumpkin, Gangster Chicken, Purple Allay, and Katana](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/s9hF9QGp/images/17a47d95a04a25ea3f8331629fcae4f5afb1adbe.jpeg)

Player with CRT and Sunglasses

![Player with CRT and Sunglasses](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/s9hF9QGp/images/63ae1f97d571e679b831037896703c50dc80e05a.jpeg)

Players Vibing

![Players Vibing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/s9hF9QGp/images/a64b3ef1971ccab39fe79dc3864a92d6caddc424.jpeg)

See more screenshots in the [Gallery](./cosmetica/gallery)

Cosmetica is sponsored by ZAP Hosting


# Customizing Cosmetics ### Cosmetica replaces the _Skin Customization_ screen with all new Cosmetica settings. You can also press **Right Shift** to quickly open the customization menu when in-game.
# Reporting Issues or Asking for Support Please use the [issue tracker](https://github.com/Cosmetica-cc/Cosmetica/issues) linked at the top of the page to report bugs, crashes, and other issues. If you're not encountering a bug but you still need support with Cosmetica, or you want to make your own cosmetics, join our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/cosmetica-942587512008888420)!
# Join Our Community ### If you have any questions or want to connect with us and our community, join our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/cosmetica-942587512008888420)! You can find all our social media at the bottom of [cosmetica.cc](https://cosmetica.cc).
